request.prompt: Create one classroom-safe educational image about Did We Get It? Quick Review. Subject: Science (086). Grade level: Class X / 10. Topic focus: Introduction to Life Processes, Nutrition Types. Must show visually: 1. What is an autotroph?; 2. Why do we need respiration?; 3. Name one life process other than nutrition.. Visual goal: A labelled classroom diagram for Did We Get It? Quick Review that makes the process or structure visible while the teacher explains quick-assessment-recap.. Teaching context: Assess understanding and reinforce key takeaways.. Student takeaway: Students can self-assess their grasp of the session's core concepts.. Show the scientific or educational concept itself, not a presentation slide about the concept. Do not draw a slide, visual panel, title banner, text box, classroom poster, infographic, worksheet, UI card, or presentation layout. Do not include any word...
